title: LogMaxTime Property
description:
This property sets the maximum recording time for the files that record force, torque, and the position of the robot during the force guide sequence execution.

If the specified recording time is shorter than the execution time of the force guide sequence, nothing is recorded in the file after the recording time is passed.  Caution is required in this regard.

Values

Minimum value 60

Maximum value 600

Default:  60

See Also: LogMaxTime Property
